历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 23788 → 23003 → 26664 → 25632 → 25339, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. 学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has continuously risen from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, showing significant improvement in recent years, steadily enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to controversy over improper conditions set in a management recruitment announcement. The university has terminated the recruitment and apologized, but the impact on application psychology is limited. Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 76th), with moderate short video exposure. No obvious enrollment gaps were recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at this university, associated with biological sciences and plant protection-related majors, attracting some candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended due to social popularity. These align well with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Class, Electronic Information Class, Electrical Class, Automation, etc.), making popular majors highly attractive. The number of Chongqing Physics Category candidates increased from 98,954 in 2021 to 139,478 in 2025, with a total of 209,000 candidates in 2026. Estimated by recent proportions, Physics Category candidates are about 137,000, a slight decrease from 2025, slightly easing competition pressure. Guizhou University is located in neighboring Guizhou Province, geographically close to Chongqing, making cross-province applications more acceptable. The university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2%-3%, which is moderately low, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, slight enrollment reduction in 2026, continuous rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing attractiveness, and a slight decrease in total candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 25339, the enrollment reduction will move the ranking forward, but the improved university level will attract more attention. The estimated minimum ranking is about 24738, with a range of 24238–25238.
